utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: Now , Mom , everything going fine , really .

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: Yeah , Ross is great . He is uh , he is in a whole other place .

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: No no , you do not have to fly back , really .

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: What do you mean this might be your only chance ?

emotion_cause.span: 5_What do you mean this might be your only chance ?

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: Would you stop ? I am only 26 , I am not even thinking about babies yet .
